activity.title: Activity Feed
activity.description: Here you can view posts and more from the users you follow.

communities.title: Communities
communities.description: Check out the communities for games that you play or games that you're curious about!

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Here you can see if you've gotten a response or reaction from other users.

intro.title: Welcome to AquaMii
intro.description: AquaMii lets you share your in-game experiences with people from all over the world.

about.title: About AquaMii
about.description_first: AquaMii is a recreation of Miiverse made by fans for fans.
about.description_second: It may not have all the features you know and love, but it can still be used nonetheless.

configuring.title: Configuring your AquaMii account
configuring.description: You need to create your account before you can start using AquaMii.
